The '''TZ-86 transport''', otherwise known as the '''Consortium Vehicle Transport''', was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] to land vehicles on [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. It was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

[[File:MotPQ_space_battle.png|thumb|left|200px|A [[Veiled Sorority/Legends|Veiled Sorority]] fleet attacking a TZ-86 transport convoy.]]

==History==
One of these ships helped [[Tyber Zann]]'s attack force on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Mask of the Pirate Queen]]''
